```
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
RAM generator helper / analyzer for SystemVerilog wrapper instances.

Purpose:
    Analyze the contents of pcie_iip_rams.sv and print a readable summary.

Python:
    Compatible with Python >= 3.6.8

Examples:
    python ramgen.py
    python ramgen.py --json
    python ramgen.py path/to/another_file.sv
"""

from __future__ import print_function

import argparse
import ast
import json
import os
import re
import sys
from collections import OrderedDict


DEFAULT_SV_FILE = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "pcie_iip_rams.sv")


class SafeExpressionEvaluator(ast.NodeVisitor):
    """Safely evaluate simple arithmetic expressions used in SV parameters."""

    ALLOWED_BINOPS = {
        ast.Add: lambda a, b: a + b,
        ast.Sub: lambda a, b: a - b,
        ast.Mult: lambda a, b: a * b,
        ast.FloorDiv: lambda a, b: a // b,
        ast.Div: lambda a, b: a // b,
        ast.Mod: lambda a, b: a % b,
        ast.LShift: lambda a, b: a << b,
        ast.RShift: lambda a, b: a >> b,
        ast.BitOr: lambda a, b: a | b,
        ast.BitAnd: lambda a, b: a & b,
        ast.BitXor: lambda a, b: a ^ b,
        ast.Pow: lambda a, b: a ** b,
    }

    ALLOWED_UNARYOPS = {
        ast.UAdd: lambda a: +a,
        ast.USub: lambda a: -a,
        ast.Invert: lambda a: ~a,
    }

    def visit(self, node):
        if isinstance(node, ast.Expression):
            return self.visit(node.body)
        if isinstance(node, ast.Num):
            return int(node.n)
        if hasattr(ast, "Constant") and isinstance(node, ast.Constant):
            if isinstance(node.value, (int, float)):
                return int(node.value)
            raise ValueError("Unsupported constant: {!r}".format(node.value))
        if isinstance(node, ast.BinOp):
            op_type = type(node.op)
            if op_type not in self.ALLOWED_BINOPS:
                raise ValueError("Unsupported operator: {}".format(op_type.__name__))
            left = self.visit(node.left)
            right = self.visit(node.right)
            return self.ALLOWED_BINOPS[op_type](left, right)
        if isinstance(node, ast.UnaryOp):
            op_type = type(node.op)
            if op_type not in self.ALLOWED_UNARYOPS:
                raise ValueError("Unsupported unary operator: {}".format(op_type.__name__))
            operand = self.visit(node.operand)
            return self.ALLOWED_UNARYOPS[op_type](operand)
        raise ValueError("Unsupported expression node: {}".format(type(node).__name__))


def normalize_sv_text(text):
    """Normalize full-width punctuation and line endings."""
    replacements = {
        u"，": ",",
        u"（": "(",
        u"）": ")",
        u"；": ";",
        u"：": ":",
    }
    for old, new in replacements.items():
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text.replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n")


def remove_comments(text):
    text = re.sub(r"/\*.*?\*/", "", text, flags=re.DOTALL)
    text = re.sub(r"//.*", "", text)
    return text


def convert_verilog_literals(expr):
    """Convert common Verilog literals like 8'd15 or 4'hF to integers."""

    def _replace(match):
        base_char = match.group(2).lower()
        value = match.group(3).replace("_", "")
        value = re.sub(r"[xzXZ]", "0", value)
        base_map = {"d": 10, "h": 16, "b": 2, "o": 8}
        try:
            return str(int(value, base_map[base_char]))
        except Exception:
            return match.group(0)

    pattern = re.compile(r"(\d+)\s*'\s*([dDhHbBoO])\s*([0-9a-fA-F_xXzZ]+)")
    return pattern.sub(_replace, expr)


def safe_eval_int(expr):
    """Evaluate an integer expression safely. Returns None on failure."""
    if expr is None:
        return None

    expr = expr.strip()
    if not expr:
        return None

    expr = convert_verilog_literals(expr)
    expr = expr.replace(" ", "")

    if re.search(r"[^0-9\+\-\*\/\(\)%<>&\|\^~]", expr):
        return None

    try:
        parsed = ast.parse(expr, mode="eval")
        return SafeExpressionEvaluator().visit(parsed)
    except Exception:
        return None


def parse_param_block(block):
    params = OrderedDict()
    if not block:
        return params

    for match in re.finditer(r"\.\s*(\w+)\s*\(\s*(.*?)\s*\)", block, flags=re.DOTALL):
        key = match.group(1)
        value = " ".join(match.group(2).split())
        params[key] = value
    return params


def parse_port_block(block):
    ports = OrderedDict()
    if not block:
        return ports

    for match in re.finditer(r"\.\s*(\w+)\s*\(\s*(.*?)\s*\)", block, flags=re.DOTALL):
        port = match.group(1)
        signal = " ".join(match.group(2).split())
        ports[port] = signal
    return ports


def parse_array_size(array_range):
    if not array_range:
        return 1

    text = array_range.strip()[1:-1]
    if ":" not in text:
        value = safe_eval_int(text)
        return value if value is not None else 1

    msb_text, lsb_text = [part.strip() for part in text.split(":", 1)]
    msb = safe_eval_int(msb_text)
    lsb = safe_eval_int(lsb_text)
    if msb is None or lsb is None:
        return 1
    return abs(msb - lsb) + 1


def estimate_bits(params):
    width = safe_eval_int(params.get("WD", ""))
    depth = safe_eval_int(params.get("DP", ""))
    if width is None or depth is None:
        return None
    return width * depth


def analyze_sv_file(file_path):
    with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        raw_text = handle.read()

    normalized = normalize_sv_text(raw_text)
    clean_text = remove_comments(normalized)

    module_match = re.search(r"\bmodule\s+(\w+)\b", clean_text)
    module_name = module_match.group(1) if module_match else "<unknown>"

    instance_pattern = re.compile(
        r"(?P<type>\w+(?:_wrapper|_ram|ram\w*))\s*"
        r"(?:#\s*\((?P<params>.*?)\))?\s*"
        r"(?P<name>\w+)\s*"
        r"(?P<array>\[[^\]]+\])?\s*"
        r"\((?P<ports>.*?)\)\s*;",
        flags=re.DOTALL,
    )

    instances = []
    for match in instance_pattern.finditer(clean_text):
        inst_type = match.group("type")
        inst_name = match.group("name")

        if inst_type == "module" or inst_name == module_name:
            continue

        params = parse_param_block(match.group("params"))
        ports = parse_port_block(match.group("ports"))
        array_range = match.group("array") or ""
        array_size = parse_array_size(array_range)
        bits_per_ram = estimate_bits(params)

        instances.append(
            {
                "type": inst_type,
                "name": inst_name,
                "array_range": array_range,
                "array_size": array_size,
                "params": params,
                "ports": ports,
                "unconnected_ports": [k for k, v in ports.items() if not v],
                "bits_per_ram": bits_per_ram,
                "total_bits": (bits_per_ram * array_size) if bits_per_ram is not None else None,
            }
        )

    type_summary = OrderedDict()
    total_blocks = 0
    total_bits = 0
    total_bits_known = True

    for item in instances:
        total_blocks += item["array_size"]
        if item["total_bits"] is None:
            total_bits_known = False
        else:
            total_bits += item["total_bits"]

        bucket = type_summary.setdefault(item["type"], {"instances": 0, "logical_blocks": 0})
        bucket["instances"] += 1
        bucket["logical_blocks"] += item["array_size"]

    return {
        "file": os.path.abspath(file_path),
        "module": module_name,
        "instance_count": len(instances),
        "logical_ram_blocks": total_blocks,
        "total_bits": total_bits if total_bits_known else None,
        "type_summary": type_summary,
        "instances": instances,
    }


def print_human_readable(report):
    print("=" * 72)
    print("RAM ANALYSIS REPORT")
    print("=" * 72)
    print("File              : {}".format(report["file"]))
    print("Module            : {}".format(report["module"]))
    print("Instances Found   : {}".format(report["instance_count"]))
    print("Logical RAM Blocks: {}".format(report["logical_ram_blocks"]))
    print(
        "Estimated Bits    : {}".format(
            report["total_bits"] if report["total_bits"] is not None else "unknown"
        )
    )

    print("\nType Summary:")
    for ram_type, info in report["type_summary"].items():
        print(
            "  - {0}: {1} instance(s), {2} logical block(s)".format(
                ram_type, info["instances"], info["logical_blocks"]
            )
        )

    print("\nInstance Details:")
    for idx, item in enumerate(report["instances"], 1):
        print("  [{}] {} ({})".format(idx, item["name"], item["type"]))
        print("      Array Range : {}".format(item["array_range"] or "scalar"))
        print("      Array Size  : {}".format(item["array_size"]))

        if item["params"]:
            joined = ", ".join("{}={}".format(k, v) for k, v in item["params"].items())
            print("      Parameters  : {}".format(joined))
        else:
            print("      Parameters  : none")

        if item["ports"]:
            port_names = ", ".join(item["ports"].keys())
            print("      Ports       : {}".format(port_names))
        else:
            print("      Ports       : none")

        if item["unconnected_ports"]:
            print("      Unconnected : {}".format(", ".join(item["unconnected_ports"])))
        else:
            print("      Unconnected : none")

        print(
            "      Est. Bits   : {}".format(
                item["total_bits"] if item["total_bits"] is not None else "unknown"
            )
        )


def build_arg_parser():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Analyze RAM wrapper instances in a SystemVerilog file."
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "sv_file",
        nargs="?",
        default=DEFAULT_SV_FILE,
        help="Path to the SystemVerilog file to analyze.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--json",
        action="store_true",
        help="Print the result as JSON instead of a text report.",
    )
    return parser


def main(argv=None):
    parser = build_arg_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    if not os.path.exists(args.sv_file):
        print("Error: file not found: {}".format(args.sv_file), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    try:
        report = analyze_sv_file(args.sv_file)
    except Exception as exc:
        print("Analysis failed: {}".format(exc), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    if args.json:
        print(json.dumps(report, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
    else:
        print_human_readable(report)

    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

```

```
def export_csv(report, csv_path):
    fieldnames = [
        "module",
        "instance_name",
        "instance_type",
        "array_range",
        "array_size",
        "bits_per_ram",
        "total_bits",
        "param_RD_LATENCY",
        "param_WD",
        "param_PW",
        "param_DP",
        "param_WEW",
        "ports",
        "unconnected_ports",
    ]

    with open(csv_path, "w", newline="", encoding="utf-8-sig") as handle:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(handle, fieldnames=fieldnames)
        writer.writeheader()

        for item in report["instances"]:
            params = item.get("params", {})
            writer.writerow(
                {
                    "module": report["module"],
                    "instance_name": item["name"],
                    "instance_type": item["type"],
                    "array_range": item["array_range"] or "scalar",
                    "array_size": item["array_size"],
                    "bits_per_ram": item["bits_per_ram"] if item["bits_per_ram"] is not None else "unknown",
                    "total_bits": item["total_bits"] if item["total_bits"] is not None else "unknown",
                    "param_RD_LATENCY": params.get("RD_LATENCY", ""),
                    "param_WD": params.get("WD", ""),
                    "param_PW": params.get("PW", ""),
                    "param_DP": params.get("DP", ""),
                    "param_WEW": params.get("WEW", ""),
                    "ports": ", ".join(item.get("ports", {}).keys()),
                    "unconnected_ports": ", ".join(item.get("unconnected_ports", [])),
                }
            )
```

```
    with open(source_sv_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        text = normalize_sv_text(handle.read())

    text = re.sub(
        r"\bmodule\s+{}\b".format(re.escape(report["module"])),
        "module pcie_ram",
        text,
        count=1,
    )

    for item in report["instances"]:
        old_ref = item["type"]
        new_ref = item.get("refefence", old_ref)
        inst_name = item["name"]
        pattern = re.compile(
            r"\b{}\b(?=\s*(?:#\s*\(.*?\))?\s*{}\b)".format(
                re.escape(old_ref), re.escape(inst_name)
            ),
            flags=re.DOTALL,
        )
        text = pattern.sub(new_ref, text, count=1)

    output_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_sv_path))
    if output_dir and not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    with open(output_sv_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(text)

    return output_sv_path
```

```
] map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def generate_output_sv(source_sv_path, output_sv_path, report):
    with open(source_sv_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:

    text = re.sub(
        r"\bmodule\s+{}\b".format(re.escape(report["module"])),
        "module pcie_ram",
        text,
        count=1,
    )

    for item in report["instances"]:
        old_ref = item["type"]

        inst_name = item["name"]

        )

    output_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_sv_path))

        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    with open(output_sv_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(text)

    return output_sv_path


def infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew):
    direction = "output" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "input"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [PW-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [WD-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [WEW-1:0]"

    return "    {} wire{} {}".format(direction, width, port_name)


def build_reference_module_text(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    params = item.get("params", {})
    include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

    param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
    if include_wew:
        param_names.append("WEW")

    param_lines = []
    for name in param_names:
        value = params.get(name, "1")
        param_lines.append("    parameter {} = {}".format(name, value))

    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    port_lines = [infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew) for port_name in port_names]

    return "module {} #(\n{}\n) (\n{}\n);\n\n    // Auto-generated RAM module template.\n\nendmodule\n".format(
        reference,
        ",\n".join(param_lines),
        ",\n".join(port_lines),
    )


def generate_reference_modules(report, output_dir):
    if output_dir and not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    written_files = []
    seen = set()

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        if reference in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(reference)

        file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, reference + ".sv")
        content = build_reference_module_text(item)
        with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
            handle.write(content)
        written_files.append(file_path)

    return written_files


def build_arg_parser():
```

```
def generate_flist(output_sv_path, wrapper_files, flist_path):
    flist_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(flist_path))
    if flist_dir and not os.path.exists(flist_dir):
        os.makedirs(flist_dir)

    all_files = [output_sv_path] + sorted(wrapper_files)
    with open(flist_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        for file_path in all_files:
            relative_path = os.path.relpath(os.path.abspath(file_path), flist_dir)
            handle.write(relative_path.replace("\\", "/") + "\n")

    return flist_path


def build_arg_parser():
```

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew):
    direction = "output reg" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "input"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [PW-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [WD-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [WEW-1:0]"

    return "    {}{} {}".format(direction, width, port_name)


def build_simulation_body(item):
    port_names = set(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    include_wew = ("WEW" in item.get("params", {})) or ("_be_" in item.get("reference", ""))

    if "clka" in port_names and "clkb" in port_names:
        return """    reg [WD-1:0] mem [0:DP-1];
    integer i;

    initial begin
        for (i = 0; i < DP; i = i + 1) begin
            mem[i] = {WD{1'b0}};
        end
        doutb = {WD{1'b0}};
    end

    always @(posedge clka) begin
        if (ena && wea) begin
            mem[addra] <= dina;
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clkb) begin
        if (enb) begin
            doutb <= mem[addrb];
        end
    end"""

    if "addra" in port_names and "addrb" in port_names:
        return """    reg [WD-1:0] mem [0:DP-1];
    integer i;

    initial begin
        for (i = 0; i < DP; i = i + 1) begin
            mem[i] = {WD{1'b0}};
        end
        doutb = {WD{1'b0}};
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (ena && wea) begin
            mem[addra] <= dina;
        end
        if (enb) begin
            doutb <= mem[addrb];
        end
    end"""

    if include_wew:
        return """    reg [WD-1:0] mem [0:DP-1];
    integer i;
    localparam integer SEG_W = (WEW > 0) ? (WD / WEW) : WD;

    initial begin
        for (i = 0; i < DP; i = i + 1) begin
            mem[i] = {WD{1'b0}};
        end
        dout = {WD{1'b0}};
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (en) begin
            for (i = 0; i < WEW; i = i + 1) begin
                if (we[i]) begin
                    mem[addr][i*SEG_W +: SEG_W] <= din[i*SEG_W +: SEG_W];
                end
            end
            dout <= mem[addr];
        end
    end"""

    return """    reg [WD-1:0] mem [0:DP-1];
    integer i;

    initial begin
        for (i = 0; i < DP; i = i + 1) begin
            mem[i] = {WD{1'b0}};
        end
        dout = {WD{1'b0}};
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (en) begin
            if (we) begin
                mem[addr] <= din;
            end
            dout <= mem[addr];
        end
    end"""


def build_reference_module_text(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    params = item.get("params", {})
    include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

    param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
    if include_wew:
        param_names.append("WEW")

    param_lines = []
    for name in param_names:
        param_lines.append("    parameter {} = -1".format(name))

    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    port_lines = [infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew) for port_name in port_names]
    sim_body = build_simulation_body(item)

    return "module {} #(\n{}\n) (\n{}\n);\n\n{}\n\nendmodule\n".format(
        reference,
        ",\n".join(param_lines),
        ",\n".join(port_lines),
        sim_body,
    )
 oldString:def infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew):
    direction = "output" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "input"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [PW-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [WD-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [WEW-1:0]"

    return "    {}{} {}".format(direction, width, port_name)


def build_reference_module_text(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    params = item.get("params", {})
    include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

    param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
    if include_wew:
        param_names.append("WEW")

    param_lines = []
    for name in param_names:
        param_lines.append("    parameter {} = -1".format(name))

    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    port_lines = [infer_port_decl(port_name, reference, include_wew) for port_name in port_names]

    return "module {} #(\n{}\n) (\n{}\n);\n\n    // Auto-generated RAM module template.\n\nendmodule\n".format(
        reference,
        ",\n".join(param_lines),
        ",\n".join(port_lines),
    )
]]
```

**Input:**

- explanation: `Extend the RAM generator to create one self-checking testbench per generated RAM type under the output tb directory.`
- replacements:

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:DEFAULT_WRAPPER_DIR = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "wrapper")
DEFAULT_TB_DIR = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "tb")
DEFAULT_FLIST_FILE = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "flist.f")
 oldString:DEFAULT_WRAPPER_DIR = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "wrapper")
DEFAULT_FLIST_FILE = os.path.join(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, "flist.f")
] map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def generate_flist(output_sv_path, wrapper_files, flist_path):
    flist_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(flist_path))
    if flist_dir and not os.path.exists(flist_dir):
        os.makedirs(flist_dir)

    all_files = [output_sv_path] + sorted(wrapper_files)
    with open(flist_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        for file_path in all_files:
            relative_path = os.path.relpath(os.path.abspath(file_path), flist_dir)
            handle.write(relative_path.replace("\\", "/") + "\n")

    return flist_path


def infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew):
    kind = "wire" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "reg"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [PW-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [WD-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [WEW-1:0]"

    return "    {}{} {};".format(kind, width, port_name)


def build_testbench_text(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    params = item.get("params", {})
    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    port_set = set(port_names)
    include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

    param_defaults = {
        "RD_LATENCY": str(params.get("RD_LATENCY", 1) or 1),
        "WD": str(params.get("WD", 8) or 8),
        "PW": str(params.get("PW", 4) or 4),
        "DP": str(params.get("DP", 16) or 16),
        "WEW": str(params.get("WEW", 1) or 1),
    }

    param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
    if include_wew:
        param_names.append("WEW")

    localparams = [
        "    localparam integer {} = {};".format(name, param_defaults[name])
        for name in param_names
    ]

    decls = [infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew) for port_name in port_names]
    decls.append("    localparam [WD-1:0] TEST_DATA = {WD{1'b1}};")

    param_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({0})".format(name) for name in param_names])
    port_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({0})".format(name) for name in port_names])

    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "`ifndef INNO_REG_RAM",
        "`define INNO_REG_RAM",
        "`endif",
        "",
        "`include \"../wrapper/{}.sv\"".format(reference),
        "",
        "module {}_tb;".format(reference),
        "",
        "\n".join(localparams),
        "",
        "\n".join(decls),
        "",
        "    {} #(\n{}\n    ) dut (\n{}\n    );".format(reference, param_map, port_map),
        "",
    ]

    if "clka" in port_set and "clkb" in port_set:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clka = 1'b0;",
            "    initial clkb = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clka = ~clka;",
            "    always #7 clkb = ~clkb;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addra = '0;",
            "        addrb = '0;",
            "        dina  = '0;",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clka);",
            "        ena   = 1'b1;",
            "        wea   = 1'b1;",
            "        addra = 'd1;",
            "        dina  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clka);",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        enb   = 1'b1;",
            "        addrb = 'd1;",
            "        @(posedge clkb);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (doutb !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 2P 2C test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 2P 2C test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    elif "addra" in port_set and "addrb" in port_set:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addra = '0;",
            "        addrb = '0;",
            "        dina  = '0;",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",
            "        ena   = 1'b1;",
            "        wea   = 1'b1;",
            "        addra = 'd1;",
            "        dina  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b1;",
            "        addrb = 'd1;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (doutb !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 2P 1C test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 2P 1C test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    elif include_wew:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addr = '0;",
            "        din  = '0;",
            "        en   = 1'b0;",
            "        we   = '0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",
            "        en   = 1'b1;",
            "        addr = 'd1;",
            "        din  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        we   = '0;",
            "        if (WEW > 0) begin",
            "            we[0] = 1'b1;",
            "        end",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we = {WEW{1'b1}};",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we = '0;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (dout !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 1P BE test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 1P BE test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    else:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addr = '0;",
            "        din  = '0;",
            "        en   = 1'b0;",
            "        we   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",
            "        en   = 1'b1;",
            "        we   = 1'b1;",
            "        addr = 'd1;",
            "        din  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we   = 1'b0;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (dout !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 1P test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 1P test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])

    lines.extend(["", "endmodule", ""])
    return "\n".join(lines)


def generate_testbenches(report, output_dir):
    if output_dir and not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    written_files = []
    seen = set()

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        if reference in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(reference)

        file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, reference + "_tb.sv")
        with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
            handle.write(build_testbench_text(item))
        written_files.append(file_path)

    return written_files


def build_arg_parser():
 oldString:def generate_flist(output_sv_path, wrapper_files, flist_path):

        os.makedirs(flist_dir)

    all_files = [output_sv_path] + sorted(wrapper_files)
    with open(flist_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        for file_path in all_files:
            relative_path = os.path.relpath(os.path.abspath(file_path), flist_dir)
            handle.write(relative_path.replace("\\", "/") + "\n")

    return flist_path


def build_arg_parser():
```

```
                "",
                "    initial begin",
                "        {}_done = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addr = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_din  = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_en   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_we   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "",
                "        repeat (2) @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_en   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_we   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addr = 'd1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_din  = {}_TEST_DATA;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "        @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_we   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        #1;",
                "        if ({}_dout !== {}_TEST_DATA) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            $error(\"{} test failed\");".format(inst_name),
                "        end else begin",
                "            $display(\"{} test passed\");".format(inst_name),
                "        end",
                "        {}_done = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "    end",
            ])

        lines.append("")
        done_flags.append("{}_done".format(sig_prefix))

    if done_flags:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial begin",
            "        wait({});".format(" && ".join(done_flags)),
            "        $display(\"All RAM instance tests completed.\");",
            "        #10;",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])

    lines.extend(["", "endmodule", ""])
    return "\n".join(lines)


def generate_testbenches(report, output_dir):
    if output_dir and not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    for name in os.listdir(output_dir):
        if name.endswith("_tb.sv"):
            try:
                os.remove(os.path.join(output_dir, name))
            except OSError:
                pass

    file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "pcie_ram_tb.sv")
    with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(build_combined_testbench_text(report))

    return [file_path]
 oldString:def infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew):
    kind = "wire" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "reg"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [PW-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [WD-1:0]"
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [WEW-1:0]"

    return "    {}{} {};".format(kind, width, port_name)


def build_testbench_text(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    params = item.get("params", {})
    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    port_set = set(port_names)
    include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

    param_defaults = {
        "RD_LATENCY": str(params.get("RD_LATENCY", 1) or 1),
        "WD": str(params.get("WD", 8) or 8),
        "PW": str(params.get("PW", 4) or 4),
        "DP": str(params.get("DP", 16) or 16),
        "WEW": str(params.get("WEW", 1) or 1),
    }

    param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
    if include_wew:
        param_names.append("WEW")

    localparams = [
        "    localparam integer {} = {};".format(name, param_defaults[name])
        for name in param_names
    ]

    decls = [infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew) for port_name in port_names]
    decls.append("    localparam [WD-1:0] TEST_DATA = {WD{1'b1}};")

    param_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({0})".format(name) for name in param_names])
    port_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({0})".format(name) for name in port_names])

    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "`ifndef INNO_REG_RAM",
        "`define INNO_REG_RAM",
        "`endif",
        "",
        "`include \"../wrapper/{}.sv\"".format(reference),
        "",
        "module {}_tb;".format(reference),
        "",
        "\n".join(localparams),
        "",
        "\n".join(decls),
        "",
        "    {} #(\n{}\n    ) dut (\n{}\n    );".format(reference, param_map, port_map),
        "",
    ]

    if "clka" in port_set and "clkb" in port_set:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clka = 1'b0;",
            "    initial clkb = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clka = ~clka;",
            "    always #7 clkb = ~clkb;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addra = '0;",
            "        addrb = '0;",
            "        dina  = '0;",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clka);",
            "        ena   = 1'b1;",
            "        wea   = 1'b1;",
            "        addra = 'd1;",
            "        dina  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clka);",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        enb   = 1'b1;",
            "        addrb = 'd1;",
            "        @(posedge clkb);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (doutb !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 2P 2C test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 2P 2C test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    elif "addra" in port_set and "addrb" in port_set:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addra = '0;",
            "        addrb = '0;",
            "        dina  = '0;",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",
            "        ena   = 1'b1;",
            "        wea   = 1'b1;",
            "        addra = 'd1;",
            "        dina  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        ena   = 1'b0;",
            "        wea   = 1'b0;",
            "        enb   = 1'b1;",
            "        addrb = 'd1;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (doutb !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 2P 1C test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 2P 1C test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    elif include_wew:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addr = '0;",
            "        din  = '0;",
            "        en   = 1'b0;",
            "        we   = '0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",
            "        en   = 1'b1;",
            "        addr = 'd1;",
            "        din  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        we   = '0;",
            "        if (WEW > 0) begin",
            "            we[0] = 1'b1;",
            "        end",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we = {WEW{1'b1}};",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we = '0;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (dout !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 1P BE test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 1P BE test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])
    else:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial clk = 1'b0;",
            "    always #5 clk = ~clk;",
            "",
            "    initial begin",
            "        addr = '0;",
            "        din  = '0;",
            "        en   = 1'b0;",
            "        we   = 1'b0;",
            "",
            "        repeat (2) @(posedge clk);",

            "        din  = TEST_DATA;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        we   = 1'b0;",
            "        @(posedge clk);",
            "        #1;",
            "        if (dout !== TEST_DATA) begin",
            "            $error(\"RAM 1P test failed\");",
            "        end else begin",
            "            $display(\"RAM 1P test passed\");",
            "        end",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])

    lines.extend(["", "endmodule", ""])
    return "\n".join(lines)


def generate_testbenches(report, output_dir):
    if output_dir and not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    written_files = []
    seen = set()

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        if reference in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(reference)

        file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, reference + "_tb.sv")
        with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
            handle.write(build_testbench_text(item))
        written_files.append(file_path)

    return written_files
]]
```

```
	$(RUN) $(OUT)

run: sim

clean:
	-$(RM) $(OUT) $(OUT).vvp *.vcd
""".format(flist=flist_name)

    with open(makefile_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(content)

    return makefile_path
```

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def generate_flist(file_paths, flist_path):
    flist_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(flist_path))
    if flist_dir and not os.path.exists(flist_dir):
        os.makedirs(flist_dir)

    seen = set()
    ordered_files = []
    for file_path in file_paths:
        norm_path = os.path.abspath(file_path)
        if norm_path not in seen:
            seen.add(norm_path)
            ordered_files.append(norm_path)

    with open(flist_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        for file_path in ordered_files:
            relative_path = os.path.relpath(file_path, flist_dir)
            handle.write(relative_path.replace("\\", "/") + "\n")

    return flist_path


def generate_tb_flist(design_flist_path, tb_files, tb_flist_path):
    tb_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(tb_flist_path))
    if tb_dir and not os.path.exists(tb_dir):

        for file_path in sorted(tb_files):
            relative_path = os.path.relpath(os.path.abspath(file_path), tb_dir)
            handle.write(relative_path.replace("\\", "/") + "\n")

    return tb_flist_path
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="multi_replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **multi_replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Update the combined testbench generator to perform randomized read/write verification across every RAM depth for all instances, while preserving x-aware checking for byte-enable RAMs.`
- replacements:

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def build_combined_testbench_text(report):
    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "",
        "module pcie_ram_tb;",
        "",
    ]

    done_flags = []

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        inst_name = item["name"]
        sig_prefix = inst_name
        param_prefix = inst_name.upper()
        params = item.get("params", {})
        port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
        port_set = set(port_names)
        include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

        param_defaults = {
            "RD_LATENCY": str(params.get("RD_LATENCY", 1) or 1),
            "WD": str(params.get("WD", 8) or 8),
            "PW": str(params.get("PW", 4) or 4),
            "DP": str(params.get("DP", 16) or 16),
            "WEW": str(params.get("WEW", 1) or 1),
        }

        param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
        if include_wew:
            param_names.append("WEW")

        lines.append("    // Instance: {}".format(inst_name))
        for name in param_names:
            lines.append(
                "    localparam integer {}_{} = {};".format(
                    param_prefix, name, param_defaults[name]
                )
            )

        width_name = "{}_WD".format(param_prefix)
        lines.append(
            "    localparam [{}-1:0] {}_TEST_DATA = {{".format(width_name, sig_prefix)
            + "{}".format(width_name)
            + "{1'b1}};"
        )

        for port_name in port_names:
            lines.append(infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew, sig_prefix, param_prefix))
        lines.append("    reg {}_done;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append(
            "    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_mem [0:{}DP-1];".format(
                param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix, param_prefix + "_"
            )
        )
        lines.append("    integer {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix))
        if include_wew:
            lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_data;".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_lane;".format(sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_bit;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append("")

        param_map = ",\n".join(
            ["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, param_prefix) for name in param_names]
        )
        port_map = ",\n".join(
            ["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, sig_prefix) for name in port_names]
        )

        lines.append(
            "    {} #(\n{}\n    ) {} (\n{}\n    );".format(
                reference, param_map, inst_name, port_map
            )
        )

        if "clka" in port_set and "clkb" in port_set:
            lines.extend([
                "",
                "    initial {}_clka = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "    initial {}_clkb = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "    always #5 {}_clka = ~{}_clka;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "    always #7 {}_clkb = ~{}_clkb;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "",
                "    initial begin",
                "        {}_done = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addra = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addrb = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_dina  = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_ena   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_enb   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_wea   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx] = 'x;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "        end",
                "",
                "        repeat (2) @(posedge {}_clka);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_ena   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_wea   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_addra = {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_dina  = $urandom;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx] = {}_dina;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            @(posedge {}_clka);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        end",
                "        {}_ena = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_wea = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "",
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_enb   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_addrb = {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            @(posedge {}_clkb);".format(sig_prefix),
                "            #1;",
                "            if ({}_doutb !== {}_exp_mem[{}_idx]) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "                $error(\"{} test failed at depth %0d\", {}_idx);".format(inst_name, sig_prefix),
                "            end",
                "        end",
                "        {}_enb = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        $display(\"{} randomized depth test passed\");".format(inst_name),
                "        {}_done = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "    end",
            ])
        elif "addra" in port_set and "addrb" in port_set:
            lines.extend([
                "",
                "    initial {}_clk = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "    always #5 {}_clk = ~{}_clk;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "",
                "    initial begin",
                "        {}_done = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addra = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_addrb = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_dina  = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_ena   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_enb   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_wea   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx] = 'x;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "        end",
                "",
                "        repeat (2) @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_ena   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_wea   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_addra = {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_dina  = $urandom;".format(sig_prefix),
                "            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx] = {}_dina;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
                "        end",
                "        {}_ena = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "        {}_wea = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "",
                "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
                "            {}_enb   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),

    ])

    lines.extend(["", "endmodule", ""])
    return "\n".join(lines)
 oldString:def build_combined_testbench_text(report):
    unique_refs = []
    seen_refs = set()
    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        if reference not in seen_refs:
            seen_refs.add(reference)
            unique_refs.append(reference)

    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "",
        "module pcie_ram_tb;",
        "",
    ]

    done_flags = []

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        inst_name = item["name"]
        sig_prefix = inst_name
        param_prefix = inst_name.upper()
        params = item.get("params", {})
        port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
        port_set = set(port_names)
        include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

        param_defaults = {
            "RD_LATENCY": str(params.get("RD_LATENCY", 1) or 1),
            "WD": str(params.get("WD", 8) or 8),
            "PW": str(params.get("PW", 4) or 4),
            "DP": str(params.get("DP", 16) or 16),
            "WEW": str(params.get("WEW", 1) or 1),
        }

        param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
        if include_wew:
            param_names.append("WEW")

        lines.append("    // Instance: {}".format(inst_name))
        for name in param_names:
            lines.append(
                "    localparam integer {}_{} = {};".format(
                    param_prefix, name, param_defaults[name]
                )
            )

        width_name = "{}_WD".format(param_prefix)
        lines.append(
            "    localparam [{}-1:0] {}_TEST_DATA = {{".format(width_name, sig_prefix)
            + "{}".format(width_name)
            + "{1'b1}};"
        )

        for port_name in port_names:
            lines.append(infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew, sig_prefix, param_prefix))
        lines.append("    reg {}_done;".format(sig_prefix))
        if include_wew:
            lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_data;".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_lane;".format(sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_bit;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append("")

        param_map = ",\n".join(
            ["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, param_prefix) for name in param_names]
        )
        port_map = ",\n".join(
            ["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, sig_prefix) for name in port_names]
        )

        lines.append(
            "    {} #(\n{}\n    ) {} (\n{}\n    );".format(
                reference, param_map, inst_name, port_map
            )
        )

        if "clka" in port_set and "clkb" in port_set:
            lines.extend([
                "",
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="multi_replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **multi_replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Add a post-processing helper in the generator to automatically insert a small delay before every non-clock stimulus assignment in the generated testbench, then regenerate the output.`
- replacements:

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew, sig_prefix, param_prefix):
    kind = "wire" if port_name.startswith("dout") else "reg"
    width = ""

    if port_name in ("addr", "addra", "addrb"):
        width = " [{}PW-1:0]".format(param_prefix + "_")
    elif port_name in ("din", "dina", "dinb", "dout", "douta", "doutb"):
        width = " [{}WD-1:0]".format(param_prefix + "_")
    elif port_name in ("we", "wea", "web") and include_wew:
        width = " [{}WEW-1:0]".format(param_prefix + "_")

    return "    {}{} {}_{};".format(kind, width, sig_prefix, port_name)


def add_stimulus_delays_to_tb_text(tb_text):
    pattern = re.compile(
        r"^\s+[A-Za-z0-9_]+_(?:addra|addrb|dina|ena|enb|wea|addr|din|en|we)\s*="
    )
    result = []
    inside_initial = False
    prev_assignment = False

    for line in tb_text.splitlines():
        stripped = line.strip()

        if stripped == "initial begin":
            inside_initial = True
            prev_assignment = False
            result.append(line)
            continue

        if inside_initial and stripped == "end":
            inside_initial = False
            prev_assignment = False
            result.append(line)
            continue

        is_stimulus_assignment = inside_initial and bool(pattern.match(line))

        if is_stimulus_assignment and not prev_assignment:
            if not result or result[-1].strip() != "#STIM_DELAY;":
                indent = line[: len(line) - len(line.lstrip())]
                result.append(indent + "#STIM_DELAY;")

        result.append(line)
        prev_assignment = is_stimulus_assignment

        if not stripped:
            prev_assignment = False

    return "\n".join(result)


def build_combined_testbench_text(report):
```

<summary>Tool use: **multi_replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Fix the stimulus-delay inserter so it stays active through nested for and if blocks inside each initial block.`
- replacements:

```
[map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def add_stimulus_delays_to_tb_text(tb_text):
    pattern = re.compile(
        r"^\s+[A-Za-z0-9_]+_(?:addra|addrb|dina|ena|enb|wea|addr|din|en|we)\s*="
    )
    result = []
    inside_initial = False
    initial_depth = 0
    prev_assignment = False

    for line in tb_text.splitlines():
        stripped = line.strip()

        if stripped == "initial begin":
            inside_initial = True
            initial_depth = 1
            prev_assignment = False
            result.append(line)
            continue

        is_stimulus_assignment = inside_initial and bool(pattern.match(line))

        if is_stimulus_assignment and not prev_assignment:
            if not result or result[-1].strip() != "#STIM_DELAY;":
                indent = line[: len(line) - len(line.lstrip())]
                result.append(indent + "#STIM_DELAY;")

        result.append(line)
        prev_assignment = is_stimulus_assignment

        if inside_initial:
            if stripped.endswith("begin") and stripped != "initial begin":
                initial_depth += 1
            elif stripped == "end":
                initial_depth -= 1
                if initial_depth <= 0:
                    inside_initial = False
                    prev_assignment = False

        if not stripped:
            prev_assignment = False

    return "\n".join(result)
```

```
    base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(sv_file))[0]

def export_excel(report, excel_path):
    if xlwt is None:
        raise RuntimeError("xlwt is required for Excel export. Please install xlwt first.")

    workbook = xlwt.Workbook(encoding="utf-8")
    sheet = workbook.add_sheet("RAM Report")

    headers = [
        "module",
        "instance_name",
        "reference",
        "array_range",
        "array_size",
        "bits_per_ram",
        "total_bits",
        "param_RD_LATENCY",
        "param_WD",
        "param_PW",
        "param_DP",
        "param_WEW",
        "ports",
        "unconnected_ports",
    ]

    header_style = xlwt.easyxf("font: bold on; align: vert centre, horiz center")
    for col, header in enumerate(headers):
        sheet.write(0, col, header, header_style)
        sheet.col(col).width = 5000

    for row, item in enumerate(report["instances"], 1):
        params = item.get("params", {})
        values = [
            report["module"],
            item["name"],
            item.get("reference", item["type"]),
            item["array_range"] or "scalar",
            item["array_size"],
            item["bits_per_ram"] if item["bits_per_ram"] is not None else "unknown",
            item["total_bits"] if item["total_bits"] is not None else "unknown",
            params.get("RD_LATENCY", ""),
            params.get("WD", ""),
            params.get("PW", ""),
            params.get("DP", ""),
            params.get("WEW", ""),
            ", ".join(item.get("ports", {}).keys()),
            ", ".join(item.get("unconnected_ports", [])),
        ]

        for col, value in enumerate(values):
            sheet.write(row, col, value)

    workbook.save(excel_path)

        "module",
        "instance_name",
        "reference",
        "array_range",
        "array_size",
        "bits_per_ram",

        "param_WEW",

    ]

        writer = csv.DictWriter(handle, fieldnames=fieldnames)
        writer.writeheader()

        for item in report["instances"]:
            params = item.get("params", {})

                    "instance_name": item["name"],
                    "reference": item.get("reference", item["type"]),
                    "array_range": item["array_range"] or "scalar",
                    "array_size": item["array_size"],
                    "bits_per_ram": item["bits_per_ram"] if item["bits_per_ram"] is not None else "unknown",
                    "total_bits": item["total_bits"] if item["total_bits"] is not None else "unknown",
                    "param_RD_LATENCY": params.get("RD_LATENCY", ""),
                    "param_WD": params.get("WD", ""),
                    "param_PW": params.get("PW", ""),

        report = analyze_sv_file(args.sv_file)
    except Exception as exc:
        print("Analysis failed: {}".format(exc), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    print_human_readable(report)

    if args.excel or args.excel_file:
        excel_path = args.excel_file or default_excel_path(args.sv_file)
        try:
            export_excel(report, excel_path)
        except Exception as exc:
            print("\nExcel export failed: {}".format(exc), file=sys.stderr)
            return 1
        print("\nExcel exported to: {}".format(excel_path))

        print("Generated {} RAM module file(s) in: {}".format(len(written_files), DEFAULT_WRAPPER_DIR))

        tb_files = generate_testbenches(report, DEFAULT_TB_DIR)
```

- content:

```
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Minimal xlwt-compatible subset for writing Excel-readable .xls reports.

This module provides only the small API surface used by ramgen.py:
- Workbook
- Workbook.add_sheet
- Worksheet.write
- Worksheet.col().width
- easyxf
"""

from __future__ import print_function

from xml.sax.saxutils import escape


class XFStyle(object):
    def __init__(self):
        self.font_bold = False
        self.h_align = "Left"
        self.v_align = "Center"

    def key(self):
        return (self.font_bold, self.h_align, self.v_align)


def easyxf(style_string=""):
    style = XFStyle()
    text = (style_string or "").lower()

    if "bold on" in text:
        style.font_bold = True
    if "horiz center" in text:
        style.h_align = "Center"
    if "vert centre" in text or "vert center" in text:
        style.v_align = "Center"

    return style


class _Column(object):
    def __init__(self):
        self.width = 0


class Worksheet(object):
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self._cells = {}
        self._cols = {}

    def write(self, row, col, value, style=None):
        self._cells[(int(row), int(col))] = (value, style)

    def col(self, index):
        index = int(index)
        if index not in self._cols:
            self._cols[index] = _Column()
        return self._cols[index]


class Workbook(object):
    def __init__(self, encoding="utf-8"):
        self.encoding = encoding
        self._sheets = []

    def add_sheet(self, name):
        sheet = Worksheet(name)
        self._sheets.append(sheet)
        return sheet

    def save(self, file_path):
        style_ids = {None: "Default"}
        style_defs = []
        style_count = 0

        for sheet in self._sheets:
            for _, (_, style) in sheet._cells.items():
                if style is None:
                    continue
                key = style.key()
                if key not in style_ids:
                    style_count += 1
                    style_id = "s{}".format(style_count)
                    style_ids[key] = style_id
                    style_defs.append((style_id, style))

        lines = [
            '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="{}"?>'.format(self.encoding),
            '<?mso-application progid="Excel.Sheet"?>',
            '<Workbook xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet"',
            ' xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office"',
            ' xmlns:x="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:excel"',
            ' xmlns:ss="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet"',
            ' xmlns:html="http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-html40">',
            ' <Styles>',
            '  <Style ss:ID="Default" ss:Name="Normal">',
            '   <Alignment ss:Vertical="Center"/>',
            '  </Style>',
        ]

        for style_id, style in style_defs:
            lines.append('  <Style ss:ID="{}">'.format(style_id))
            lines.append(
                '   <Alignment ss:Horizontal="{}" ss:Vertical="{}"/>'.format(
                    style.h_align, style.v_align
                )
            )
            if style.font_bold:
                lines.append('   <Font ss:Bold="1"/>')
            lines.append('  </Style>')

        lines.append(' </Styles>')

        for sheet in self._sheets:
            max_row = 0
            max_col = 0
            for row, col in sheet._cells.keys():
                max_row = max(max_row, row)
                max_col = max(max_col, col)

            lines.append(' <Worksheet ss:Name="{}">'.format(escape(sheet.name)))
            lines.append(
                '  <Table ss:ExpandedColumnCount="{}" ss:ExpandedRowCount="{}">'.format(
                    max_col + 1, max_row + 1
                )
            )

            for col_index in sorted(sheet._cols.keys()):
                width = sheet._cols[col_index].width
                if width:
                    excel_width = max(float(width) / 35.0, 20.0)
                    lines.append(
                        '   <Column ss:Index="{}" ss:Width="{:.2f}"/>'.format(
                            col_index + 1, excel_width
                        )
                    )

            current_row = -1
            for (row, col) in sorted(sheet._cells.keys()):
                if row != current_row:
                    if current_row != -1:
                        lines.append('   </Row>')
                    lines.append('   <Row ss:Index="{}">'.format(row + 1))
                    current_row = row

                value, style = sheet._cells[(row, col)]
                if isinstance(value, bool):
                    data_type = "Number"
                    data_value = "1" if value else "0"
                elif isinstance(value, (int, float)):
                    data_type = "Number"
                    data_value = str(value)
                else:
                    data_type = "String"
                    data_value = escape("" if value is None else str(value))

                style_id = "Default"
                if style is not None:
                    style_id = style_ids.get(style.key(), "Default")

                lines.append(
                    '    <Cell ss:Index="{}" ss:StyleID="{}"><Data ss:Type="{}">{}</Data></Cell>'.format(
                        col + 1, style_id, data_type, data_value
                    )
                )

            if current_row != -1:
                lines.append('   </Row>')

            lines.append('  </Table>')
            lines.append(' </Worksheet>')

        lines.append('</Workbook>')

        with open(file_path, 'w', encoding=self.encoding) as handle:
            handle.write('\n'.join(lines))

```

```
def build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, data_expr, include_wew=False, we_expr=None, special_first_lane=False):
    if we_expr is None:
        we_expr = "$urandom" if include_wew else "1'b1"

    lines = [
        "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(
            sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix
        ),
        "            {}_en   = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
        "            {}_addr = {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
        "            {}_din  = {};".format(sig_prefix, data_expr),
        "            {}_we   = {};".format(sig_prefix, we_expr),
    ]

    if include_wew:
        if special_first_lane:
            lines.extend([
                "            if ({}_idx == 0) begin".format(sig_prefix),
                "                {}_we = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
                "                if ({}_WEW > 0) begin".format(param_prefix),
                "                    {}_we[0] = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
                "                end",
                "            end",
            ])

        lines.extend([
            "            for ({}_lane = 0; {}_lane < {}_WEW; {}_lane = {}_lane + 1) begin".format(
                sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix
            ),
            "                if ({}_we[{}_lane]) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
            "                    for ({}_bit = 0; {}_bit < 8; {}_bit = {}_bit + 1) begin".format(
                sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix
            ),
            "                        if (({}_lane * 8 + {}_bit) < {}_WD) begin".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix),
            "                            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx][{}_lane * 8 + {}_bit] = {}_din[{}_lane * 8 + {}_bit];".format(
                sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix
            ),
            "                        end",
            "                    end",
            "                end",
            "            end",
        ])
    else:
        lines.append("            {}_exp_mem[{}_idx] = {}_din;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix))

    lines.extend([
        "            @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
        "        end",
        "        {}_we = {};".format(sig_prefix, "'0" if include_wew else "1'b0"),
        "",
    ])
    return lines


def build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, include_wew=False, label=""):
    prefix = (inst_name + " " + label).strip()
    lines = [
        "        for ({}_idx = 0; {}_idx < {}_DP; {}_idx = {}_idx + 1) begin".format(
            sig_prefix, sig_prefix, param_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix
        ),
        "            {}_addr = {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix),
    ]

    if include_wew:
        lines.append("            {}_exp_data = {}_exp_mem[{}_idx];".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix, sig_prefix))

    lines.extend([
        "            @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
        "            #1;",
        "            if ({}_dout !== {}) begin".format(
            sig_prefix,
            "{}_exp_data".format(sig_prefix) if include_wew else "{}_exp_mem[{}_idx]".format(sig_prefix, sig_prefix)
        ),
        "                $error(\"{} test failed at depth %0d\", {}_idx);".format(prefix, sig_prefix),
        "            end",
        "        end",
        "",
    ])
    return lines


def build_dual_port_case_lines(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, dual_clock):
    write_clk = "{}_clka".format(sig_prefix) if dual_clock else "{}_clk".format(sig_prefix)
    read_clk = "{}_clkb".format(sig_prefix) if dual_clock else "{}_clk".format(sig_prefix)

    lines = build_tb_clock_lines(sig_prefix, dual_clock)
    lines.extend([
        "    initial begin",
        "        {}_done = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_addra = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_addrb = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_dina  = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_ena   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_enb   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_wea   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
    ])
    lines.extend(build_exp_mem_reset_lines(sig_prefix, param_prefix))
    lines.extend([
        "",
        "        repeat (2) @(posedge {});".format(write_clk),
    ])
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, write_clk, "$urandom"))
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, read_clk))
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, write_clk, "{}_TEST_DATA".format(sig_prefix)))
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, read_clk, "all-1"))
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, write_clk, "'0", "'0"))
    lines.extend(build_dual_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, read_clk, "all-0"))
    lines.extend([
        "        $display(\"{} all depth tests passed\");".format(inst_name),
        "        {}_done = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
        "    end",
    ])
    return lines


def build_single_port_case_lines(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, include_wew):
    lines = build_tb_clock_lines(sig_prefix, False)
    lines.extend([
        "    initial begin",
        "        {}_done = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
    ])
    if include_wew:
        lines.append("        {}_exp_data = 'x;".format(sig_prefix))
    lines.extend([
        "        {}_addr = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_din  = '0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_en   = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        {}_we   = {};".format(sig_prefix, "'0" if include_wew else "1'b0"),
    ])
    lines.extend(build_exp_mem_reset_lines(sig_prefix, param_prefix))
    lines.extend([
        "",
        "        repeat (2) @(posedge {}_clk);".format(sig_prefix),
    ])

    if include_wew:
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "$urandom", True, "$urandom", True))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, True))
        full_we = "{{{}_WEW{{1'b1}}}}".format(param_prefix)
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "{}_TEST_DATA".format(sig_prefix), True, full_we))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, True, "all-1"))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "'0", True, full_we))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, True, "all-0"))
    else:
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "$urandom"))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "{}_TEST_DATA".format(sig_prefix), False, "1'b1"))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, False, "all-1"))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_write_phase(sig_prefix, param_prefix, "'0", False, "1'b1"))
        lines.extend(build_single_port_read_phase(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, False, "all-0"))

    lines.extend([
        "        {}_en = 1'b0;".format(sig_prefix),
        "        $display(\"{} all depth tests passed\");".format(inst_name),
        "        {}_done = 1'b1;".format(sig_prefix),
        "    end",
    ])
    return lines


def build_combined_testbench_text(report):
    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "",
        "module pcie_ram_tb;",
        "",
        "    localparam integer STIM_DELAY = 1;",
        "",
    ]

    done_flags = []

    for item in report.get("instances", []):
        reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
        inst_name = item["name"]
        sig_prefix = inst_name
        param_prefix = inst_name.upper()
        params = item.get("params", {})
        port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
        port_set = set(port_names)
        include_wew = ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)

        param_defaults = {
            "RD_LATENCY": str(params.get("RD_LATENCY", 1) or 1),
            "WD": str(params.get("WD", 8) or 8),
            "PW": str(params.get("PW", 4) or 4),
            "DP": str(params.get("DP", 16) or 16),
            "WEW": str(params.get("WEW", 1) or 1),
        }

        param_names = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
        if include_wew:
            param_names.append("WEW")

        lines.append("    // Instance: {}".format(inst_name))
        for name in param_names:
            lines.append("    localparam integer {}_{} = {};".format(param_prefix, name, param_defaults[name]))

        width_name = "{}_WD".format(param_prefix)
        lines.append(
            "    localparam [{}-1:0] {}_TEST_DATA = {{".format(width_name, sig_prefix)
            + "{}".format(width_name)
            + "{1'b1}};"
        )

        for port_name in port_names:
            lines.append(infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew, sig_prefix, param_prefix))
        lines.append("    reg {}_done;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_mem [0:{}DP-1];".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix, param_prefix + "_"))
        lines.append("    integer {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix))
        if include_wew:
            lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_data;".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_lane;".format(sig_prefix))
            lines.append("    integer {}_bit;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append("")

        param_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, param_prefix) for name in param_names])
        port_map = ",\n".join(["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, sig_prefix) for name in port_names])

        lines.append("    {} #(\n{}\n    ) {} (\n{}\n    );".format(reference, param_map, inst_name, port_map))

        if "clka" in port_set and "clkb" in port_set:
            lines.extend(build_dual_port_case_lines(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, True))
        elif "addra" in port_set and "addrb" in port_set:
            lines.extend(build_dual_port_case_lines(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, False))
        else:
            lines.extend(build_single_port_case_lines(inst_name, sig_prefix, param_prefix, include_wew))

        lines.append("")
        done_flags.append("{}_done".format(sig_prefix))

    if done_flags:
        lines.extend([
            "    initial begin",
            "        wait({});".format(" && ".join(done_flags)),
            "        $display(\"All RAM instance tests completed.\");",
            "        #10;",
            "        $finish;",
            "    end",
        ])

    lines.extend([
        "",
        "    initial begin",
        "        $fsdbDumpfile(\"tb.fsdb\");",
        "        $fsdbDumpvars(0, pcie_ram_tb, \"+all\");",
        "        $fsdbDumpMDA;",
        "    end",
    ])

    lines.extend(["", "endmodule", ""])
    return add_stimulus_delays_to_tb_text("\n".join(lines))
```

```
DEFAULT_TB_FLIST_FILE = os.path.join(DEFAULT_TB_DIR, "flist.f")
DEFAULT_MAKEFILE = os.path.join(DEFAULT_TB_DIR, "makefile")
COMMON_PARAM_NAMES = ["RD_LATENCY", "WD", "PW", "DP"]
DEFAULT_PARAM_VALUES = {"RD_LATENCY": 1, "WD": 8, "PW": 4, "DP": 16, "WEW": 1}


def ensure_dir(path):
    if path and not os.path.exists(path):
        os.makedirs(path)


def is_byte_enable_ram(reference, params):
    return ("WEW" in params) or ("_be_" in reference)


def get_param_names(include_wew):
    names = list(COMMON_PARAM_NAMES)
    if include_wew:
        names.append("WEW")
    return names


def get_param_defaults(params):
    defaults = {}
    for name, fallback in DEFAULT_PARAM_VALUES.items():
        defaults[name] = str(params.get(name, fallback) or fallback)
    return defaults


def build_instance_maps(names, prefix):
    return ",\n".join(["        .{0}({1}_{0})".format(name, prefix) for name in names])


def build_output_layout(output_sv_path, flist_path=None):
    output_sv_path = os.path.abspath(output_sv_path)
    output_dir = os.path.dirname(output_sv_path)
    tb_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "tb")
    wrapper_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "wrapper")
    return {
        "output_dir": output_dir,
        "wrapper_dir": wrapper_dir,
        "tb_dir": tb_dir,
        "flist": flist_path or os.path.join(output_dir, "flist.f"),
        "tb_flist": os.path.join(tb_dir, "flist.f"),
        "makefile": os.path.join(tb_dir, "makefile"),
    }

] map[filePath:c:\Users\man\Desktop\code\ramgen\ramgen.py newString:def build_tb_instance_preamble(item):
    reference = item.get("reference", item["type"])
    inst_name = item["name"]
    sig_prefix = inst_name
    param_prefix = inst_name.upper()
    params = item.get("params", {})
    port_names = list(item.get("ports", {}).keys())
    include_wew = is_byte_enable_ram(reference, params)
    param_defaults = get_param_defaults(params)
    param_names = get_param_names(include_wew)

    lines = ["    // Instance: {}".format(inst_name)]
    for name in param_names:
        lines.append("    localparam integer {}_{} = {};".format(param_prefix, name, param_defaults[name]))

    width_name = "{}_WD".format(param_prefix)
    lines.append("    localparam [{0}-1:0] {1}_TEST_DATA = {{{0}{{1'b1}}}};".format(width_name, sig_prefix))

    for port_name in port_names:
        lines.append(infer_tb_signal_decl(port_name, include_wew, sig_prefix, param_prefix))
    lines.append("    reg {}_done;".format(sig_prefix))
    lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_mem [0:{}DP-1];".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix, param_prefix + "_"))
    lines.append("    integer {}_idx;".format(sig_prefix))
    if include_wew:
        lines.append("    reg [{}WD-1:0] {}_exp_data;".format(param_prefix + "_", sig_prefix))
        lines.append("    integer {}_lane;".format(sig_prefix))
        lines.append("    integer {}_bit;".format(sig_prefix))
    lines.append("")

    param_map = build_instance_maps(param_names, param_prefix)
    port_map = build_instance_maps(port_names, sig_prefix)
    lines.append("    {} #(\n{}\n    ) {} (\n{}\n    );".format(reference, param_map, inst_name, port_map))

    return {
        "inst_name": inst_name,
        "sig_prefix": sig_prefix,
        "param_prefix": param_prefix,
        "port_set": set(port_names),
        "include_wew": include_wew,
        "lines": lines,
    }


def build_combined_testbench_text(report):
    lines = [
        "`timescale 1ns/1ps",
        "",
```
